text_block_list.text:
Finally having a day to relax, I head to the shopping mall to do some
browsing.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hm... There are a plethora of treatment oils here, but they're all
glorified cooking oils that emphasize fragrance over quality.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
In that case, perhaps the baobab seed oil from earlier will do... But in
terms of permeability, it lacks the right ingredients. Hmph...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: T-Trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
What are you doing he—what am I saying? You're obviously
shopping. Still, this is quite the coincidence.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I was comparing the various hair oils here. I'm just about out of my
current supply.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I figured I would check if anything new was available. Even for the
same products, ingredients are often changed to suit the latest
research.
choice_data_list: You sure put a lot of thought into it, huh?
You sure put a lot of thought into it, huh?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I suppose... But as you see, hair care is an unceasing struggle for me.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Come on, just look at it. My hair is... well, it tends to become rather
frizzled.

Her hair does seem a little frizzy, but it doesn't look all that terrible
to be concerned about.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: You don't... You surely don't believe my hair is naturally like this?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
This is the result of a maximum amount of effort. Each day, I style it to
minimize split ends, and my nighttime routine is far more complicated
than average.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: But... It's still not enough. My hair, it won't...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
It's a shaggy mess of knots! Even my stylist admitted defeat against
my hyper tangles!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Yes. It's not the exact definition, but I'm left with no choice but to
call it that. My hair is an anomaly!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I use off-the-shelf products as well as ones of my own making. I even
tried an unnatural concoction of Tachyon's, but to no avail!
choice_data_list:
(Woah! Who is this, and what has she done to
Hayahide?!)

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
My agony begins the moment I wake up in the morning. Have you
ever jumped out of bed choking on your own hair?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: The rainy season is especially problematic! Dealing with my hair has never been a source of joy. It is, rather, my mortal enemy.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
And people tell me to just cut it short. But that would be the worst
move to make! My face would look as big as a race track!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
It's not that I prefer it long, but that's the bitter decision I made after
considering the advantages of either letting it hang or tying it up. But
of course...

The frazzled genius continues airing her hair grievances for some
time...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Sigh... How many times I've wished to have straight hair like Brian's.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I remember the shock when I first braided her hair when we were
children. The silky touch as I ran my fingers through it... I screamed,
"How can our hair be so different?!"

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I even tried holding my hair down with our father's pomade... But of
course, it would never feel silky like Brian's that way. It was hopeless.

I picture how adorable she must have been glopping pomade on her
hair, and I can't hold in my smile.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Wha... Are you laughing?! I'm pouring my heart out here!
choice_data_list:
Ah, I was just thinking about how you always
give it your all.

text_block_list.name: Store Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Um, excuse me, miss? You seem to be having trouble deciding. Is
there anything I can help you with?

text_block_list.name: Store Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Apologies for overhearing, but I understand that you're having some
trouble with your hair. Perhaps I could recommend our—

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: N-No, I'm fine... Thank you anyway.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Let's take our leave now.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I, um, apologize for earlier. I become somewhat... animated when it
comes to hair.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
But shouting in a public space like that without an ounce of
self-control... I must've looked pathetic.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: What?

I tell her just how incredible I think she is. How she always strives to
improve herself, and how she always puts her whole heart into a
challenge.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You praise me too much... I'm simply figuring out my problems
through trial and error. If my hair was any good to begin with, I
would've never put the effort in.
choice_data_list: But all that effort made you who you are today.
But all that effort made you who you are today.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
That's... possible, I suppose. From all the anguish my hair gave me, I
may have gained the determination never to give in.
choice_data_list: Then maybe it wasn't all that bad, right?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
But... that's a matter of hindsight. Let's not make light of the suffering
I went through all that time.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I swear... your interpretation of the data is truly unique. Not at all like
mine. But that's why I like talking with you.

I think my words have begun to sink in, as I see her expression soften.
In that case...
choice_data_list:
Anyway, I think your hair is fluffy and
wonderful.

Anyway, I think your hair is fluffy and
wonderful.

text_block_list.text: I simply tell her my honest opinion, but...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Let me stop you right there. That is one comment I cannot overlook.
Though I do appreciate your opinion and kind words.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
However, if that's the conclusion you drew from our conversation just
now, I must say that your reasoning is flawed.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: There is a need to deliberate once more about this matter.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
There's no backing out now. As my trainer, you must understand the
pain I go through as much as I do.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Now, get comfortable. It's time I told you my tragic life story. No objections.

We go to a cafe, and I try as hard as I can to listen to Hayahide's
passion-fueled Theory of Frizzy Hair. Now I truly understand how she
feels... I think.
